Video.summary: With the birth of his child fast approaching, Crichton must find a way to use the wormhole technology to bring an end to the Scarran-Peacekeeper war.
Video.title: Farscape: The Peacekeeper Wars

Video.summary: For trade with the Tavleks, Rygel (John Eccleston, Jonathan Hardy) takes a crystal essential to Moya's survival.
Video.title: Throne for a Loss

Video.summary: When an evil sorcerer engineers a deadly contest between Crichton and Crais, Zhaan must rouse a dark power within herself to rescue Crichton.
Video.title: That Old Black Magic

Video.summary: While gathering data to re-create a wormhole, Crichton and Aeryn are confronted by wolflike bounty hunters in search of Moya's crew.
Video.title: Till the Blood Runs Clear

Video.summary: Giant space-cockroaches invade the ship, infest the corridors and clog the vents, causing a rise in temperature which endangers Aeryn.
Video.title: Exodus From Genesis

Video.summary: Moya tries to starburst to prove to the crew that she still can; it goes slightly wrong though and she gets stuck in starburst and split into several different dimensions.
Video.title: Through the Looking Glass

Video.summary: A sensual alien seduces men to obtain a weapon of mass destruction; Crichton experiences mental flashes of the future.
Video.title: Back and Back and Back to the Future

Image.alt: Back and Back and Back to the Future
Back and Back and Back to the Future
Back and Back and Back to the Future
Back and Back and Back to the Future
Back and Back and Back to the Future
Back and Back and Back to the Future

Video.summary: Moya crash-lands on a planet to avoid being traced by the Peacekeepers; Crichton soon realizes that he has become an alien to the inhabitants.
Video.title: I, E.T.

Video.summary: The crew of the Moya tries to save Crichton from the hands of Crais and the Peacekeepers; with Gigi Edgley and Wayne Pygram.
Video.title: The Hidden Memory

Video.summary: When the crew seeks out a genetic scientist who can provide them with charts to their homeworlds, the scientist secretly injects Aeryn with Pilot's DNA.
Video.title: DNA Mad Scientist

Video.summary: Moya and her unsuspecting crew encounter a carnivorous alien.
Video.title: Bone to Be Wild

Video.summary: After D'Argo suffers a mishap during a maintenance check on Moya, he is tormented by flashbacks; the ship strikes out at the crew.
Video.title: They've Got a Secret

Video.summary: Crichton stumbles upon the planet of Acquara, an Earth-like paradise where no mechanical devices seem to function after landing.
Video.title: Jeremiah Crichton

Video.summary: Peacekeeper commandos board the ship after a fuel leak and join the Moya's crew in battle against a deadly virus.
Video.title: A Bug's Life

Video.summary: With death approaching in the form of Peacekeeper search parties, those aboard Moya say their final goodbyes and share a last feast together, before enacting a plan to save Moya and her baby, named Talyn.
Video.title: Family Ties

Video.summary: Crichton must free D'Argo from the influence of a thought-altering plant.
Video.title: Thank God It's Friday, Again

Video.summary: Astronaut John Crichton is accidentally hurled across a universe and thrust into the middle of a space battle after his ship is swallowed by a wormhole.
Video.title: Premiere

Video.summary: Mental cleansing changes a Peacekeeper, who once tormented Rygel, into a servile being; with Ben Browder, Gigi Edgley and Tiriel Mora.
Video.title: Durka Returns

Video.summary: Crichton and a female Peacekeeper Tech, left behind by Captain Crais, join forces to save Moya when a race of scavengers attacks.
Video.title: PK Tech Girl

Video.summary: Crichton travels through a wormhole that greatly affects Earth, where the entire crew is subjected to intense testing and imprisonment.
Video.title: A Human Reaction

Video.summary: When Zhaan tries to aid in curing Tahleen's madness, Tahleen betrays her and reveals Zhaan's dark side.
Video.title: Rhapsody in Blue

Video.summary: An invisible net controlled by Zenetan pirates captures Crichton and Aeryn's transport pod and threatens to snare the Moya as well.
Video.title: The Flax

Video.summary: Crichton must infiltrate a Peacekeeper base to save Aeryn's life, but ends up facing torture in an alien electric chair and archenemy Crais.
Video.title: Nerve

Video.summary: Crichton, Aeryn and D'argo are stranded in an asteroid field while Scorpius searches for them; their safety depends on Crais, who is nearby in Talyn.
Video.title: Mind the Baby

Video.summary: John Crichton and his love Aeryn Sun are reunited; the wormhole knowledge that Crichton possesses makes him a target in an intergalactic war.
Video.title: Farscape: The Peacekeeper Wars
